title: alaticaulia helgae
side_effects: Alaticaulia helgae can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to stomach problems, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In some cases, overexposure to the plant's toxic compounds can result in liver damage and kidney failure. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can also lead to skin irritation, including redness, swelling, and burns.
